            *   `\u221a\u00a7` -> `§` (Section sign). Often used for 'ß' in old German texts or just a corruption. In this context "Gespr\u221a\u00a7ch" -> "Gespräch". "Schottl\u221a\u00a7ndischen" -> "Schottländischen".
            *   `\u221a\u00bassen` -> "müssen".
